Offer.Description: Immerse yourself in the story of James Bond’s origins—a young, resourceful, and sometimes reckless trainee agent in the MI6 training program—and discover how he became the world’s most famous spy. After a heroic act, young naval pilot James Bond is offered a chance to join the newly reactivated Double-0 program. However, when a mission to stop a rogue agent ends in tragedy, he must join forces with his reluctant mentor, Greenway, to expose a deep-seated conspiracy and stop an impending coup at the heart of the state. Become 007 and discover a new, standalone, reimagined origin story of James Bond and the events that lead a daring young hero to become MI6’s top agent. Enjoy a thrilling spy adventure featuring missions in breathtaking locations, driving iconic vehicles, and a cinematic quest to track down a rogue agent who’s always one step ahead. Choose your approach: stealthy or loud. Fight with your fists or with fire, use gadgets to infiltrate, or bluff your way past the guards. The choice is entirely yours. Welcome to MI6!
